content:
Architectural design software document management: file tool for design documents

Document management is an important guarantee for architectural design projects. From design documents to file versions, from file systems to document sharing, document management helps designers manage design results. This article will comprehensively evaluate the document management functions of mainstream architectural design software to help Architects master document management tools.

Corevalue of document management

Document management plays key functions in architectural design:

  • Design documents: architectural design document management
  • File version: design document version control
  • File system: design archive management system
  • Document sharing: design document sharing collaboration
  • Document secure: design document secure management

In-depth Review: mainstream document management function

BIM 360 document management

BIM 360 document is a professional function of construction project management.

Core Features:

  • Document management
  • Version control
  • Document sharing
  • Document secure
  • Document approval

BIM 360 Document:

BIM 360 Document's Coreadvantages is version control. Designers can manage document version history.

Document sharing:

  • Software Supported document sharing, team sharing design documents.

Procore document management

Procore document is a professional function of construction project management.

Core Features:

  • Document management
  • File system
  • Document search
  • Document approval
  • Document reporting

Procore documentation:

Coreadvantages of Procore documentation is a filing system. Designers can manage the design file system.

Document search:

  • Software Supported document search, fast search for design documents.

PlanGrid document management

PlanGrid document is a professional function for construction project management.

Core Features:

  • Document management
  • Drawing management
  • Version control
  • Document annotation
  • Document synchronization

PlanGrid document:

Coreadvantages of PlanGrid document is drawing management. Designers can manage architectural drawing documents.

Document annotation:

  • Software Supported document annotation, annotation of design document content.

Document management development trend prediction

Cloud document dominance

Cloud documents will become mainstream. Designers can manage documents in the cloud and realize cloud collaboration

AI document assistance

AI will assist document management. AI can automatically classify documents and optimize document management.

Document intelligent search

Document intelligent search will be more improved. Designers can search documents more conveniently.

Document secureenh ancement

Document security will be more enhanced. Design documents will manage storage more securely.

Purchase recommendations

When choosing a document management solution, it is recommended to consider:

  • Management requirements: Evaluate document management function requirements
  • Version requirements: Evaluate version control management Management needs
  • Archive needs: Assess file system management needs
  • Sharing needs: Assess document sharing and collaboration needs
  • Secure needs: Assess document secure management needs

Document management is a file tool for design documents. Choose an appropriate document management solution to achieve efficient management of architectural design documents.
author: Agricultural Technology Research Team
